candidates.subject: BTC
candidates.observation: BTC is holding above the latest higher-low and remains structurally constructive.
candidates.evidence: Exchange-side participation stayed healthy while leverage remained controlled.
candidates.risk: A clean loss of the local higher-low would invalidate the current constructive read.
candidates.next_step: Review whether relative strength persists into the next major session.

pain_log.missing_question: I still cannot compare the current structure cleanly to the last three multi-week breakouts.
pain_log.notes: If this gap repeats across several thesis cycles, add one external historical-data API instead of widening the realtime system.

candidates.subject: ARB
candidates.observation: ARB is trying to hold reclaimed support while catalyst flow remains active.
candidates.evidence: The latest market snapshot still shows aligned structure and narrative support.
candidates.risk: A failed retest into the prior range would invalidate the current setup.
candidates.next_step: Check whether the reclaimed level still holds after the next active session.

candidates.subject: JTO
candidates.observation: JTO remains catalyst-rich but volatile, with a still-defined local support shelf.
candidates.evidence: Momentum remains event-driven and the setup still has a bounded invalidation level.
